T0013.title: Empty Package
T0013.definition: An empty parcel, typically sent by merchants engaged in fake order brushing or fraudulent transactions. This package contains no actual goods—it may be an empty box or filled with worthless filler—to fabricate the appearance of shipment and delivery, thereby artificially inflating a store's sales volume and credibility.
